THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, LAWRENCE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 159 TIFFANY STREET, APT #3, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, STAYED UNTIL JUL-26-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. WAIVES RENT AND DAMAGES, DEFT TO PAY $700 ON OR BEFORE 7/26/94, IF DEFT FAILS TO MAKE PAYMENT EXPARTE APPLICATION CAN BE FILED AND JUDGMENT ENTERED FOR $2800 R & D, COST $115 AND ATTY FEES OF $600 AND REST, FAILURE TO RESTORE PREMISES BY 7/26/94 THE SAME JUDGMENT MAY ISSUE.
